debug_info.goal:
C : CategoryInContext.Cat
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Functor.mk ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.fst ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.fst
      ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.snd ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.snd
      (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd C) (Category.id C))
      (fun {X Y} =>
        @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd C) (Category.id C) Y X)
      (fun X =>
        @CategoryInContext.Functor.map_id (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd C) (Category.id C) X)
      ⋯ =
    Category.id ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩
